query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN isPassed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed,
       type, COUNT(*) as count
FROM events 
GROUP BY type
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1grUzB66oStVVFP.root --database gPiHJoB3NKeoE8WP6B5f8y --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN isPassed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed,
       type, COUNT(*) as count
FROM events 
GROUP BY type
ORDER BY count DESC;
